description.en: Distance between two digits since the event's beginning. Expressed as a floating-point multiple of the initial distance between the digits at the beginning of the event. Values below 1.0 indicate an inward pinch (zoom out). Values above 1.0 indicate an outward unpinch (zoom in). Initial value:1.0.

description.en: A Boolean value indicating whether or not the shift key was down when the touch event was fired.
